query: 2026 WGA Minimum Basic Agreement streaming residuals pension enhancements unpaid labor details site:wga.org

mako.raw:
{"query":"2026 WGA Minimum Basic Agreement streaming residuals pension enhancements unpaid labor details site:wga.org","model":"mako","response_time_ms":12167,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://greenslate.com/blog/2026-wga-mba-contract-changes","title":"2026 WGA MBA: Ratified Contract Changes and Effective Dates","content":"WGA membership ratified the 2026 MBA on April 24, 2026, with 90.38% (4,282 members) voting in favor and 9.62% (456 members) voting no.
Format Minimum (Article 13.B.7.m.(1))
Notice deadline is December 15, 2028, for a May 2, 2029 effective date.
* The MOA specifies a new $475,000 threshold effective May 2, 2027 for contracts for employment on programs other than basic cable.
Domestic residual bases for High Budget SVOD programs are updated.
For the full schedule of minimums, see the WGA MBA contracts page.
The foreign residual subscriber factor for Tier 4 (75 million or more foreign subscribers) increases from 90.0% to 95.0%, effective under the 2026 MBA.
For programs initially exhibited on or after January 1, 2027, the bonus increases to 75% of the applicable fixed residual (including the foreign fixed residual for services that pay it).
This applies across television motion pictures, basic cable programs, and High Budget SVOD programs.
WGA membership ratified the agreement on April 24, 2026, with notice delivered to the AMPTP prior to May 2, 2026, confirming May 2, 2026 as the effective date.
Under the 2026 MBA, the mandatory second-step rewrite obligation is triggered when the first draft is purchased or assigned at 225% or less of minimum (up from 200%)."},{"url":"https://www.wgacontract.org/the-campaign/summary-of-the-2026-wga-mba","title":"Summary of the 2026 WGA MBA","content":"The Health Fund contribution on reportable earnings will increase 3.25% in the first year of the agreement, from 13% to 16.25%, and then another 0.5% in the second year, to 16.75%.
In addition, the deal includes a one-time transfer of $25 million to the Health Fund from the Paid Parental Leave fund, which will still maintain sufficient funding to pay out benefits.
With these changes, the Anthem PPO offering will continue to provide access to a broad network of providers with low participant cost-sharing compared to most plans in the U.S.
As an alternative to the Anthem PPO, starting in 2027 the Health Fund will offer a new plan option for active participants and pre-Medicare retirees through a network called Centivo, which includes all of the UCLA health system in Los Angeles and Mount Sinai in NY as well as providers in other parts of the country.
The contract increases the annual funding for the Showrunner Training Program from $250,000 to $275,000, which will support both WGAW and WGAE’s programs.
If you have questions, WGAW members should contact the Contracts Department; WGAE members should contact Mack Harden, mharden@wgaeast.org.
2More details on the Centivo Partnership Plan will be available later in 2026."},{"url":"https://deadline.com/2026/04/wga-2026-contract-details-studios-1236784944/","title":"WGA Reveals Details Of Its Studio Deal","content":"In addition to the increases in employer contribution to the health plan, WGA leadership also wrote to members in a memo that they had “negotiated necessary plan changes, effective in 2027, adhering to goals of preserving choice and keeping out-of-pocket costs for writers as manageable as possible.”
The union also touted increases in domestic and foreign residuals for streaming.
The success bonus established by the 2023 contract will increase to a 75% base residual for the most popular shows.
The WGA West staff is still on strike as well."},{"url":"https://www.wgaeast.org/wp-content/uploads/sites/4/2025/04/2024-2026-WGA-PBS-Schedule-of-Minimums.pdf","title":"2024 - 2027 WGA-PBS Schedule of Minimums","content":"Teleplay Only. 5 minutes. $1,401. $1,433. $1,505. $1,558. $1,605. 10 minutes. $2,646. $2,705. $2,840. $2,939. $3,027. 15 minutes. $3,964. $4,053. $4,256. $4,405.Read more16 pages"}]}

See the initial list of candidates for the 2026 Board of Directors election and download the petition for candidacy. ##### 2026 Writers Guild Awards.","score":0.31579977,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.wga.org/contracts/contracts/mba/2026-mba-contract-changes-faq","title":"2026 MBA Contract Changes FAQ","content":"##### A summary of the negotiated amendments to be included in the 2026 MBA. Most MBA minimums increase by 1.5% for the first year of the agreement, and will increase another 3% on May 2, 2027, 3% on May 2, 2028, and 3% on May 2, 2029. The Health Fund contribution on reportable earnings will increase 3.25% in the first year of the agreement, from 13% to 16.25%, and then another 0.5% in the second year, to 16.75%. The increased contribution rates, one-time transfer, and higher contribution caps are projected to result in a total of **$321 million** in additional contributions to the Health Fund over the term of the agreement including **$280 million** in new money from the companies. By comparison, the last time the Guild sought increases to bolster the Health Fund in 2017, the companies agreed to increase the contribution rate by 2% over the term of the MBA and to increase the overall deal caps by $25,000.","score":0.28554174,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":1.01,"request_id":"1f330a77-900b-45ea-a0d2-cc2056df61c6"}
